location: Inside a chest hidden behind an illusory wall in Sellia Hideaway — past a corpse holding Preserving Boluses, roll or attack the back wall of the small closed-off alcove to reveal the room.
tactics: Reach Sellia Hideaway from Church of the Plague grace (head north, then find a secret door behind the headstone in a small graveyard) or faster via the spirit spring south of Fort Faroth
Follow the crystal cave's right-hand wall to a closed-off alcove — the back wall is illusory, not a switch
The Preserving Boluses corpse just before the hidden room is your landmark that you're in the right spot
Crystalian enemies patrol the tunnels — tanky in melee, but they break apart into weaker limbed sub-enemies once damaged enough
lore: Carved from pure crystal by hands no ordinary person could manage, and charged with enough latent magic to deal damage beyond its physical edge.

builds.name: Intelligence/Dex poke
builds.why: D Dexterity plus E Intelligence scaling and flat magic damage make it a cheap early option for a Dex/Int hybrid caster
